allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('client_id:', [c['clientId'] for c in d.get\('clients',[]\) if not c.get\('standardFlowEnabled',True\) or c.get\('serviceAccountsEnabled'\)]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; ds=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'  uid={d.get\(\\"uid\\",\\"?\\"\)}, name={d[\\"name\\"]}, type={d[\\"type\\"]}'\) for d in ds]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; ds=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'  uid={d[\\"uid\\"]}, title={d[\\"title\\"]}'\) for d in ds]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; ds=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(ds\)} dashboards'\); [print\(f'  uid={d[\\"uid\\"]}, title={d[\\"title\\"]}'\) for d in ds]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Entry Service:', json.dumps\(d, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Consolidated Service:', json.dumps\(d, indent=2\)\)")
